title: Fix Add Team Member modal — remove permission error and enable saving

requirements.summary: Remove the permission error banner and frontend-side permission guard from the AddUserModal component to enable authenticated users to add team members
acceptanceCriteria: No permission error banner appears in the Add Team Member modal
Modal displays Name, Email ID, and Role fields only
Cancel and Add Member buttons are present and functional
Submitting the form calls the backend and saves the new team member

file_operations.description: Remove any permission check logic or error state that displays 'You do not have permission to add team members'. Ensure the modal renders only the clean form with Name, Email ID, and Role fields, plus Cancel and Add Member buttons. The submit handler should call the addTeamMember mutation without any frontend-side authorization guard. Verify that the form remains functional and calls the backend to save the new team member on submission.
